characters.name: Naoe Riki
characters.description:
Riki is the fifth member of the Little Busters, and of them, he is seen as the weakest due to his girlish appearance and physical build, but he is the only one that is straightforward and has common sense among them. His parents died when he was very young, and around the same time he was diagnosed with narcolepsy.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Inohara Masato
characters.description:
Masato is a member of the Little Busters, and is Riki's roommate. He loves to work out and improve his muscle mass. His rival is Kengo Miyazawa, fellow member of the Little Busters. 

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Miyazawa Kengo
characters.description:
Kengo is a member of the Little Busters. He is skilled in the art of kendo and seemingly has a cynical personality, but his passion for the Little Busters is unmatched by anyone.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Natsume Kyousuke
characters.description:
Kyousuke is the leader of the Little Busters, and is one year older than the other four members. He often comes up with absurd ideas, but almost always he follows up with a reasonable explanation along with it. He suffers from a lolita complex, though he denies it. He also suffers from a brother-sister complex, as he wants his sister Rin to call him onii-chan (meaning brother in an affectionate way), but Rin does not want to.

[spoiler]His alter-egos are Mask the Saitou(マスク・ザ・斉藤) and Tokikaze Shun(時風 瞬).[/spoiler]

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Natsume Rin
characters.description:
Rin is the younger sister of Kyousuke Natsume and is the only female member out of the five original members of the Little Busters. She does not communicate well and is seen as inarticulate, but is still popular, being considered the school idol. 
She is usually seen alone with cats or with the Little Busters' members.

From[url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters] Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Saigusa Haruka
characters.description:
Haruka is a schoolmate of Riki's from a different class, but despite this, always seems to find time to hang around in Riki's classroom. She is a problem child and will start an uproar for her own personal enjoyment, which causes the public morals chairman Kanata Futaki to often chase after her.

From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Kamikita Komari
characters.description:
Komari is very childish, taking great interest in fairy-tales, picture books, candy, and clothing with many layers of frills. She is very clumsy, and will often not think before she acts. She does well in her studies and is also surprisingly athletic, though this is somewhat hampered by the fact that she is quite weak and has never done any sport properly before.

From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Noumi Kudryavka
characters.name_original: 能美 クドリャフカ
aliases: 直枝 クドリャフカ
characters.description:
Kudryavka is a girl who is a quarter Japanese, and three-quarters Russian. Her full Russian name is Kudryavka Anatolyevna Strugatskaya. Her grandmother is Japanese. Her grandfather was crazy about Japanese culture and per his influence on her, she came to know much about Japanese culture too, including the language. Despite having a poor handle on the English language, she was able to skip a year in school due to credits obtained through studying abroad. She is Riki's classmate and is in the newly-formed home economics club due to an invitation of the head of the dormitory she lives at with the other characters. Kudryavka and the dormitory head are the only two members, and since the latter is often too busy, club activities are suspended and Kudryavka is the sole active member of a club on the verge of being disbanded.

From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Futaki Kanata
characters.description:
Kanata is a girl at Riki's school and is the public morals chairman, which means when Haruka causes trouble, Kanata must run after her. To help Kanata, Kudryavka offered up her two dogs Strelka and Belka to patrol the school grounds and help in hunting down Haruka when she causes trouble.

[spoiler]Kanata is Haruka's twin sister, though this is only revealed later. She acts extremely cold to Haruka, although it is later revealed she is forced to treat Haruka coldly by her kinsmen, and actually made efforts to release Haruka from them. Since the only real difference between Haruka and Kanata is their eye color, Kanata uses this to her advantage when she impersonates her sister with colored contacts. Kanata cooks well, while Haruka is very specialized and not as good, and this is one of the few ways to identify her when she is impersonating Haruka.[/spoiler]

[spoiler]In short words, she has the polar opposite personality to Haruka the twin sister.[/spoiler]

From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters] Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Sasasegawa Sasami
characters.description:
Sasami is a girl at Riki's school and is Rin's rival. Surprisingly, while Rin loves cats, Sasami is a devoted dog lover. Due to this, she will often get in a fight with Rin, though since she is the captain of the girls' softball team, she will send in three new team members first before she goes in herself. Sasami's name is thought to be a tongue twister, which even she manages to mix up.

[spoiler]The reason for her avoiding cats is due to the disappearance of her own cat Kuro during her childhood. In Sasami's route, which happens after the events in Refrain, Sasami's cat Kuro created a world similar to the Little Busters! world around the school, in order to meet Sasami one last time before dying.[/spoiler]

From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Nishizono Mio
characters.description:
Mio is a calm girl who is very diligent. Due to having weak health, she is always seen with a parasol when outside. She enjoys reading, especially when the story contains boys love elements, and her room is filled with books. She carries around a book of poems by Bokusui Wakayama.

From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters] Wikipedia[/url]

characters.name: Kurugaya Yuiko
characters.description:
Yuiko is Riki's classmate who has a self-sufficient personality. She is seen as an older sister to everyone despite being the same age of almost the entire cast. She is fond of things or people she considers to be cute, such as several of the female cast of characters, especially Rin and Komari in particular. She was born outside of Japan, but is still entirely Japanese. She was given the birth name of Elizabeth which would often be shortened to Lizbeth as a nickname but does not share this as she prefers to be referred as Kurugaya.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Tokido Saya
characters.description:
In the daytime, she is a popular girl in her class at Riki's school due to her attractive face and figure, though is known to be a natural airhead. However, at night, she can be found at the school wandering around in order to protect a "treasure" from those she calls the "darkness executives" and even has to fight them for it.

[spoiler]Her real first name is Aya(あや)[/spoiler]

characters.name: Amano Akari
characters.description:
The previous head of the girl's dormitory.
More commonly referred to by her nickname of A-chan, she is the president of the home economics club, which Kudryavka is a member of, and she likes interesting and strange things.

[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kud_Wafter]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Kamikita Kojirou
characters.description:
Kojirou is an old man in a nursing home Komari and Riki volunteer at. He has trouble keeping his room clean. He is Komari's grandfather, although this is revealed later as he refused to tell Riki about his relationship with Komari. He is actually escaping from Komari, after she becomes insane for the first time and treats him like her dead brother.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Midori
characters.description:
Midori is Mio's forgotten imaginary sister who [spoiler]comes to life in the artificial world and[/spoiler] takes Mio's place. Her personality is the direct opposite of Mio. She materializes due to taking Mio's shadow, so she herself has no shadow, but she does not hide it, unlike Mio.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Little_Busters!_characters#Secondary_characters]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Dorj
characters.description: Dorj is one of the Rin's cats. He can be used by Rin as weapon in battle mini-games. He says "Nuo" instead of meowing.

characters.name: Koshiki Miyuki
characters.description: Miyuki is a girl in the archery club who lost her right eye due to the infection. Her family is known for being skilled in archery. Due to being in a similar situation as Kengo, she worries about him.

characters.name: Kawagoe Rei
characters.description: One of Sasami's followers.

characters.name: Watanabe Sakiko
characters.description: One of Sasami's followers.

characters.name: Nakamura Yukari
characters.description: One of Sasami's followers.

characters.name: Haruka's mother
characters.description: She is a mother of Saigusa Haruka and Futaki Kanata. She was married to two men due to the family's unusual tradition.

characters.name: Kamikita Takuya
characters.description: He is a deceased brother of Komari. He dead at 12 years old, when Komari was 4 years old.

characters.name: Sasasegawa Sasami
characters.description: Sasami in cat's form in her route.

characters.name: Lennon
characters.description: Rin's and Kyousuke's male cat known for holding prediction letters on his tail.

characters.name: Miles
characters.description: The old cat that lived his last years playing with Rin alone.

characters.name: Strelka
characters.description: Kud's dog.

characters.name: Riki's Legal Guardian
characters.description: He is a legal guardian of Naoe Riki. In Rin's route he stopped to add money to Riki's bank card for runaway from the school with Rin.

characters.name: Saigusa Shou
characters.description: The father of Saigusa Haruka and also co-father of Futaki Kanata. The Saigusa-Futaki family was famous for 2 fathers and 1 mother unusual family model.

characters.name: Mr. Futaki
characters.description:
Saigusa Haruka's and Futaki Kanata's common father.

Later in Haruka's route there was revealed that Haruka has not only her own older twin sister, but also the other father whose name is Saigusa Shou, and even Kanata and Haruka were born to the same mother but to both exact different fathers(via heteropaternal superfecundation for explanation).

characters.name: Mad Suzuki
characters.description: The leader of the mad scientists who assists Nishizono Mio by giving her high-tech weapons in the battle mini-game if Mio's route is cleared.

characters.name: Ivan Strugatsky
characters.name_original: イワン・ストルガツキー
characters.description: The maternal grandfather of Kudryavka Noumi, and father of Chernushka Strugatskaya.

characters.name: Aikawa
characters.description: A student from 2-A class, who had a bad motivation to study well due to lovesickness, that he had a crush on Sasasegawa Sasami.

characters.name: Chernushka Strugaskaya
characters.name_original: チェルヌシカ・ストルガツカヤ
characters.description: The mother of Kudryavka Noumi.
